---
title: "GLEAM full spatial transcriptomics workflow"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GLEAM full spatial transcriptomics workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 10.2,
  fig.height = 7.4,
  out.width = "98%",
  dpi = 180
)

pkg_root <- if (file.exists("DESCRIPTION")) "." else if (file.exists(file.path("..", "DESCRIPTION"))) ".." else NULL
if (!is.null(pkg_root) && requireNamespace("pkgload", quietly = TRUE)) {
  pkgload::load_all(pkg_root, export_all = FALSE, quiet = TRUE)
} else if (requireNamespace("GLEAM", quietly = TRUE)) {
  library(GLEAM)
} else {
  stop("Need installed 'GLEAM' or package 'pkgload' to render this vignette.")
}
```

## 1) Load Seurat spatial objects and inspect slices

```{r no-seurat-fallback, eval=!requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), echo=FALSE, fig.width=10.8, fig.height=7.8, out.width="100%"}
cat("Seurat is not available in this rendering environment. Showing representative pre-rendered spatial figures.\n\n")
fig_root_candidates <- c("man/figures", "../man/figures", "../../man/figures")
fig_root <- fig_root_candidates[file.exists(fig_root_candidates)][1]
if (is.na(fig_root)) fig_root <- "man/figures"
knitr::include_graphics(c(
  file.path(fig_root, "spatial_slice_signature.png"),
  file.path(fig_root, "trajectory_signature_trend.png")
))
```

```{r spatial-load, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
library(Seurat)

a1_path <- system.file("extdata", "full_examples", "stxBrain_anterior1_seurat.rds", package = "GLEAM")
p1_path <- system.file("extdata", "full_examples", "stxBrain_posterior1_seurat.rds", package = "GLEAM")
if (a1_path == "") a1_path <- file.path("inst", "extdata", "full_examples", "stxBrain_anterior1_seurat.rds")
if (p1_path == "") p1_path <- file.path("inst", "extdata", "full_examples", "stxBrain_posterior1_seurat.rds")

sp_a1 <- readRDS(a1_path)
sp_p1 <- readRDS(p1_path)
if (requireNamespace("SeuratObject", quietly = TRUE)) {
  sp_a1 <- tryCatch(SeuratObject::UpdateSeuratObject(sp_a1), error = function(e) sp_a1)
  sp_p1 <- tryCatch(SeuratObject::UpdateSeuratObject(sp_p1), error = function(e) sp_p1)
}

dim(sp_a1); sp_a1
dim(sp_p1); sp_p1
```

```{r spatial-native-slices, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
p1 <- tryCatch(
  Seurat::SpatialDimPlot(sp_a1, group.by = "orig.ident", pt.size.factor = 1.6) +
    ggplot2::labs(title = "Anterior slice"),
  error = function(e) NULL
)
p2 <- tryCatch(
  Seurat::SpatialDimPlot(sp_p1, group.by = "orig.ident", pt.size.factor = 1.6) +
    ggplot2::labs(title = "Posterior slice"),
  error = function(e) NULL
)
if (!is.null(p1)) print(p1)
if (!is.null(p2)) print(p2)
```

## 2) Build matrix + metadata for combined analysis

```{r spatial-build-matrix, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
assay_a1 <- tryCatch(SeuratObject::DefaultAssay(sp_a1), error = function(e) "Spatial")
assay_p1 <- tryCatch(SeuratObject::DefaultAssay(sp_p1), error = function(e) "Spatial")

expr_a1 <- tryCatch(SeuratObject::LayerData(sp_a1, assay = assay_a1, layer = "counts"), error = function(e) NULL)
if (is.null(expr_a1) || nrow(expr_a1) < 1L || ncol(expr_a1) < 1L) {
  expr_a1 <- tryCatch(SeuratObject::GetAssayData(sp_a1, assay = assay_a1, slot = "counts"), error = function(e) NULL)
}
if (is.null(expr_a1) || nrow(expr_a1) < 1L || ncol(expr_a1) < 1L) {
  stop("Cannot extract counts matrix from anterior slice.")
}

expr_p1 <- tryCatch(SeuratObject::LayerData(sp_p1, assay = assay_p1, layer = "counts"), error = function(e) NULL)
if (is.null(expr_p1) || nrow(expr_p1) < 1L || ncol(expr_p1) < 1L) {
  expr_p1 <- tryCatch(SeuratObject::GetAssayData(sp_p1, assay = assay_p1, slot = "counts"), error = function(e) NULL)
}
if (is.null(expr_p1) || nrow(expr_p1) < 1L || ncol(expr_p1) < 1L) {
  stop("Cannot extract counts matrix from posterior slice.")
}

meta_a1 <- as.data.frame(sp_a1[[]], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
meta_p1 <- as.data.frame(sp_p1[[]], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
if (is.null(rownames(meta_a1))) rownames(meta_a1) <- colnames(sp_a1)
if (is.null(rownames(meta_p1))) rownames(meta_p1) <- colnames(sp_p1)

common_genes <- intersect(rownames(expr_a1), rownames(expr_p1))
expr <- cbind(expr_a1[common_genes, , drop = FALSE], expr_p1[common_genes, , drop = FALSE])

meta_a1 <- meta_a1[colnames(expr_a1), , drop = FALSE]
meta_p1 <- meta_p1[colnames(expr_p1), , drop = FALSE]
meta_a1$sample <- "anterior"
meta_p1$sample <- "posterior"
meta <- rbind(meta_a1, meta_p1)
meta <- meta[colnames(expr), , drop = FALSE]

if (ncol(expr) > 8000) {
  set.seed(123)
  keep <- sample(colnames(expr), size = 8000)
  expr <- expr[, keep, drop = FALSE]
  meta <- meta[keep, , drop = FALSE]
}

if (!"section" %in% colnames(meta)) meta$section <- meta$sample
if (!"group" %in% colnames(meta)) meta$group <- meta$sample
if (!"region" %in% colnames(meta)) {
  if ("seurat_annotations" %in% colnames(meta)) {
    meta$region <- as.character(meta$seurat_annotations)
  } else if ("seurat_clusters" %in% colnames(meta)) {
    meta$region <- paste0("cluster_", meta$seurat_clusters)
  } else {
    meta$region <- meta$group
  }
}
if (!all(c("x", "y") %in% colnames(meta))) {
  if (all(c("imagecol", "imagerow") %in% colnames(meta))) {
    meta$x <- meta$imagecol
    meta$y <- meta$imagerow
  } else if (all(c("array_col", "array_row") %in% colnames(meta))) {
    meta$x <- meta$array_col
    meta$y <- meta$array_row
  } else {
    meta$x <- seq_len(nrow(meta))
    meta$y <- as.numeric(as.factor(meta$sample))
  }
}
if (!"pseudotime" %in% colnames(meta)) {
  meta$pseudotime <- rank(meta$x, ties.method = "average") / nrow(meta)
}
if (!"lineage" %in% colnames(meta)) {
  meta$lineage <- as.character(meta$region)
}

region_levels <- names(sort(table(as.character(meta$region)), decreasing = TRUE))
group_levels <- unique(as.character(meta$group))
group_levels <- group_levels[!is.na(group_levels) & nzchar(group_levels)]
if (length(group_levels) < 1L) group_levels <- c("anterior", "posterior")
meta$region <- factor(as.character(meta$region), levels = region_levels)
meta$group <- factor(as.character(meta$group), levels = group_levels)

pal_region <- setNames(get_palette("gleam_discrete", n = length(region_levels), continuous = FALSE), region_levels)
pal_group <- setNames(get_palette("brewer_set2", n = length(group_levels), continuous = FALSE), group_levels)

head(meta[, intersect(c("sample", "section", "group", "region", "x", "y", "imagecol", "imagerow"), colnames(meta)), drop = FALSE])
```

```{r spatial-meta-map, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=10.8, fig.height=7.2}
ggplot2::ggplot(meta, ggplot2::aes(x = .data$x, y = .data$y, color = .data$group)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(size = 0.55, alpha = 0.8) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = pal_group, drop = FALSE) +
  ggplot2::coord_fixed() +
  ggplot2::scale_y_reverse() +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "Combined spatial coordinates by group", x = NULL, y = NULL, color = "Group") +
  gleam_theme(base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(panel.grid = ggplot2::element_blank())
```

## 3) Score signatures for spatial data

```{r spatial-score, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
genes <- rownames(expr)
k <- min(30L, length(genes))
gs <- list(
  Spatial_signature_A = unique(genes[seq_len(k)]),
  Spatial_signature_B = unique(rev(genes)[seq_len(k)])
)

sp <- score_signature(
  expr = expr,
  meta = meta,
  geneset = gs,
  geneset_source = "list",
  seurat = FALSE,
  method = "rank",
  min_genes = 3,
  verbose = FALSE
)
sp$meta$region <- factor(as.character(sp$meta$region), levels = region_levels)
sp$meta$group <- factor(as.character(sp$meta$group), levels = group_levels)
sp$meta$sample <- as.character(sp$meta$sample)

# also score a single slice object for native tissue rendering
obj_genes <- rownames(sp_a1)
gs_slice <- lapply(gs, function(g) intersect(g, obj_genes))
gs_slice <- gs_slice[vapply(gs_slice, length, integer(1)) >= 3L]
if (length(gs_slice) == 0L) {
  gs_slice <- list(Spatial_signature_A = unique(obj_genes[seq_len(min(30L, length(obj_genes)))]) )
}

sp_slice <- score_signature(
  object = sp_a1,
  geneset = gs_slice,
  geneset_source = "list",
  seurat = TRUE,
  layer = "counts",
  slot = "counts",
  method = "rank",
  min_genes = 3,
  verbose = FALSE
)
```

## 4) Slice-level signature map (native tissue context)

```{r spatial-native-signature, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=11.4, fig.height=8.4, out.width="100%"}
top_sig <- rownames(sp_slice$score)[1]
plot_spatial_score(
  sp_slice,
  pathway = top_sig,
  object = sp_a1,
  point_size = 1.7,
  alpha = 0.92,
  palette = "gleam_continuous"
)
```

## 5) Combined spatial coordinates (across slices)

```{r spatial-combined-map, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=11.0, fig.height=8.0, out.width="100%"}
coords <- data.frame(x = meta$x, y = meta$y, row.names = rownames(meta))
plot_spatial_score(
  sp,
  pathway = rownames(sp$score)[1],
  coords = coords,
  split.by = "section",
  point_size = 1.3,
  alpha = 0.9,
  palette = "gleam_continuous"
)
```

```{r spatial-multi, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=12.0, fig.height=8.2, out.width="100%"}
plot_spatial_multi(
  sp,
  pathways = rownames(sp$score)[seq_len(min(4L, nrow(sp$score)))],
  coords = coords,
  point_size = 1.15,
  alpha = 0.88,
  palette = "gleam_continuous"
)
```

## 6) Differential analysis in spatial context

```{r spatial-diff, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
res_group_region <- test_signature(
  sp,
  region = "region",
  group = "group",
  sample = "sample",
  level = "sample_region",
  method = "wilcox"
)

head(res_group_region$table)
```

```{r spatial-diff-plot, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=11.2, fig.height=8.0, out.width="100%"}
top_sp <- res_group_region$table$pathway[order(res_group_region$table$p_adj)][1]
if (is.na(top_sp) || !nzchar(top_sp)) top_sp <- rownames(sp$score)[1]

p1 <- plot_spatial_score(
  sp,
  pathway = top_sp,
  coords = coords,
  split.by = "region",
  point_size = 1.35,
  alpha = 0.9,
  palette = "gleam_continuous"
)
p2 <- plot_spatial_compare(res_group_region)

if (requireNamespace("patchwork", quietly = TRUE)) {
  p1 + p2 + patchwork::plot_layout(widths = c(2.4, 1.2))
} else {
  p1
  p2
}
```

## 7) Embedding-style and pseudotime-style spatial views

```{r spatial-embed-link, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
emb2 <- as.matrix(meta[, c("x", "y"), drop = FALSE])
rownames(emb2) <- rownames(meta)
colnames(emb2) <- c("Spatial_1", "Spatial_2")

plot_embedding_score(
  sp,
  pathway = rownames(sp$score)[1],
  embedding = emb2,
  reduction = "umap",
  palette = "gleam_continuous"
)
```

```{r spatial-pseudotime, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
lineage_levels <- unique(as.character(meta$lineage))
lineage_levels <- lineage_levels[!is.na(lineage_levels) & nzchar(lineage_levels)]
if (length(lineage_levels) < 1L) lineage_levels <- "lineage_1"
pal_lineage <- setNames(get_palette("brewer_dark2", n = length(lineage_levels), continuous = FALSE), lineage_levels)

plot_pseudotime_score(
  sp,
  pathway = rownames(sp$score)[1],
  pseudotime = "pseudotime",
  lineage = "lineage",
  palette = pal_lineage
)
```
